Moringa benghalensis var. benghalensis is known for its rich nutritional content and has various health benefits. It has antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties that help in preventing chronic diseases. The plant's leaves, seeds, and pods are used to make tea, oil, and other products that promote digestive health, reduce blood pressure, and support the immune system. Regular consumption of Moringa benghalensis var. benghalensis has been linked to improved eye health, skin health, and wound healing.
